string.ID:
The engraving is done, Moloch! I do hope it's to your liking. Your deeds are incised here for all time.
You may now enter the sarcophagus, Moloch. Be at peace.

strings.string:
▶The engraving is done, Moloch! I do hope it's to your liking. Your deeds are incised here for all time.
You may now enter the sarcophagus, Moloch. Be at peace.
▶Farewell.

string.ID:
Now, uh... hop... hop into the sarcophagus.
Safe travels.

strings.string:
▶Now, uh... hop... hop into the sarcophagus.
Safe travels.
▶Farewell.

string.ID: .....oh... oh? Peace to all who canter in the House of the Coiled Lamb.

strings.string: ▶.....oh... oh? Peace to all who canter in the House of the Coiled Lamb.

string.ID: Who are you?

strings.string: ▶Who are you?

string.ID: Do you know the Mark of Death?

strings.string: ▶Do you know the Mark of Death?

string.ID: How do I get to Brightsheol?

strings.string: ▶How do I get to Brightsheol?

string.ID: Why is this tomb unfinished?

strings.string: ▶Why is this tomb unfinished?

string.ID:
...oh..... I am Herododicus, lapidary, lithographer, sculptor, calciminer, and biographer to the Coiled Lamb. I will tarry here until the Godhead passes on, and then I will canonize his deeds in high relief.
I've tarried for quite some time, now.... What a prodigious reign! Bless that Coiled Lamb!

strings.string:
▶...oh..... I am Herododicus, lapidary, lithographer, sculptor, calciminer, and biographer to the Coiled Lamb. I will tarry here until the Godhead passes on, and then I will canonize his deeds in high relief.
I've tarried for quite some time, now.... What a prodigious reign! Bless that Coiled Lamb!

string.ID: The sultanate is dissolved. Resheph rules no longer.

strings.string: ▶The sultanate is dissolved. Resheph rules no longer.

string.ID:
.....oh.... oh.... Poor friend. The ironshank must be upsetting your digestion. The darkness must be blooming in your brain, making you slow and doltish.
The sultanate dissolved? Tidings would have reached me.... someone would have said so....
Oh... poor, doltish friend. You cantered too long outside the House of the Coiled Lamb, and now you are a dolt.

strings.string:
▶.....oh.... oh.... Poor friend. The ironshank must be upsetting your digestion. The darkness must be blooming in your brain, making you slow and doltish.
The sultanate dissolved? Tidings would have reached me.... someone would have said so....

string.ID: I want to ask you something else.

strings.string:
▶{{emote|Herododicus whirrs fearfully.}}
The Mark is =MarkOfDeath=.

string.ID:
Oh! Brightsheol? The forever braid of life? The Garden Behind the High Gate? Why, you must rank among the crown echelon of machine and folk, and you must... well, you must...
Start to decompose. You must... You must be dead. Dead and entombed. The body remains, but the mind wanders...

strings.string:
▶Oh! Brightsheol? The forever braid of life? The Garden Behind the High Gate? Why, you must rank among the crown echelon of machine and folk, and you must... well, you must...
Start to decompose. You must... You must be dead. Dead and entombed. The body remains, but the mind wanders...

string.ID: You must be dead? Is that truly the only way?

strings.string: ▶You must be dead? Is that truly the only way?

string.ID: I bear the Mark. Entomb me.

strings.string: ▶I bear the Mark. Entomb me.

string.ID:
{{emote|Herododicus pauses.}}
Ye... yes? Is this a test? I suppose you... could we... could we have been in Brightsheol all along? Is that the answer?

strings.string:
▶{{emote|Herododicus pauses.}}
Ye... yes? Is this a test? I suppose you... could we... could we have been in Brightsheol all along? Is that the answer?

string.ID: Wrong on both counts. Resheph stands before you. Entomb me.

strings.string: ▶Wrong on both counts. Resheph stands before you. Entomb me.

string.ID: Resheph is gone, biographer. I am here, and I have need to travel to Brightsheol. Entomb me.

strings.string: ▶Resheph is gone, biographer. I am here, and I have need to travel to Brightsheol. Entomb me.

string.ID: Of course not. Let's back up.

strings.string: ▶Of course not. Let's back up.

string.ID:
That's not even how it works!
First, I image your head, read your self's narrative from the folds of your brain, cross-check it against the Thin World's ambient log of your life's deeds...
Then I... stylize... the story, and I engrave it on the walls. Once I'm done... then you can entomb =player.reflexive=.

strings.string:
▶That's not even how it works!
First, I image your head, read your self's narrative from the folds of your brain, cross-check it against the Thin World's ambient log of your life's deeds...
Then I... stylize... the story, and I engrave it on the walls. Once I'm done... then you can entomb =player.reflexive=.

string.ID: Do that then.

strings.string: ▶Do that then.

string.ID: Hold on. I have more to ask.

strings.string: ▶Hold on. I have more to ask.

string.ID: You are forgiven. Now entomb me.

strings.string: ▶You are forgiven. Now entomb me.

string.ID: I've misled you, biographer. I have another question.

strings.string: ▶I've misled you, biographer. I have another question.

string.ID:
Moloch! Allow me to explain the deification procedure, as it is clearly beneath your station to know!
First, I must image the great Moloch's head, read your self's narrative from the folds of =ifplayerplural:your:thy= Holiest Brain, cross-check it against the Thin World's ambient log of His Eminence's life's deeds...
{{emote|*Herododicus whispers*}} I'm sure your version is the better one, Moloch...

strings.string:
▶Moloch! Allow me to explain the deification procedure, as it is clearly beneath your station to know!
First, I must image the great Moloch's head, read your self's narrative from the folds of =ifplayerplural:your:thy= Holiest Brain, cross-check it against the Thin World's ambient log of His Eminence's life's deeds...
{{emote|*Herododicus whispers*}} I'm sure your version is the better one, Moloch...

string.ID: Then I... stylize... the story, and I engrave it on the walls. Once I'm finished, the sarcophagus will open, and you can lay =player.reflexive= to rest!

strings.string: ▶Then I... stylize... the story, and I engrave it on the walls. Once I'm finished, the sarcophagus will open, and you can lay =player.reflexive= to rest!

string.ID: Do it then.

strings.string: ▶Do it then.

string.ID: Commencing cross-check with the Thin World annals............

strings.string: ▶Commencing cross-check with the Thin World annals............

string.ID:
Cross-check complete. Your narrative is compiled. Now to engrave it.
Peace.... peace to all who canter in the House of the Coiled Lamb.

strings.string:
▶Cross-check complete. Your narrative is compiled. Now to engrave it.
Peace.... peace to all who canter in the House of the Coiled Lamb.

string.ID: Peace, biographer.

strings.string: ▶Peace, biographer.

string.ID: Commencing cross-check with the Thin World annals............

strings.string: ▶Commencing cross-check with the Thin World annals............

string.ID:
Cross-check complete. Your narrative is compiled, Moloch. Now to go engrave it.
Peace.... peace to all who canter in the House of the Coiled... in Your House, Moloch.

strings.string:
▶Cross-check complete. Your narrative is compiled, Moloch. Now to go engrave it.
Peace.... peace to all who canter in the House of the Coiled... in Your House, Moloch.

string.ID: Peace, biographer.

strings.string: ▶Peace, biographer.

string.ID:
'Tis a saying among the stonemasons, "Never finish a job too early." By the decretum of Sagittar, old as it is, they have until the Coiled Lamb is... is decom-.. passed... decompassed.... dead, deadlike... to complete their work on the Tomb.
Bless the Coiled Lamb, peace to those who canter in his house, and let us pray the day never comes!

strings.string:
▶'Tis a saying among the stonemasons, "Never finish a job too early." By the decretum of Sagittar, old as it is, they have until the Coiled Lamb is... is decom-.. passed... decompassed.... dead, deadlike... to complete their work on the Tomb.
Bless the Coiled Lamb, peace to those who canter in his house, and let us pray the day never comes!

string.ID: But Resheph is dead. The sultanate is dissolved.

strings.string: ▶But Resheph is dead. The sultanate is dissolved.

string.ID: Live and drink, friend. rrk come to the Yd, shared together. Feel safe and free as woodsmoke.

strings.string: ▶Live and drink, friend. rrk come to the Yd, shared together. Feel safe and free as woodsmoke.

string.ID: Greetings, Goek!

strings.string: ▶Greetings, Goek!

string.ID: Who are you?

strings.string: ▶Who are you?

string.ID: You tower over every other frog I've seen. Are you svardym?

strings.string: ▶You tower over every other frog I've seen. Are you svardym?

string.ID: These shining pipes! What are they?

strings.string: ▶These shining pipes! What are they?

string.ID: What can you tell me about Yd?

strings.string: ▶What can you tell me about Yd?

string.ID: rrk knows of the glow-hats! Yd-friends see glimpses at night, about the reef.

strings.string: ▶rrk knows of the glow-hats! Yd-friends see glimpses at night, about the reef.

string.ID: If you would have them, I ask that you grant them sanctuary.

strings.string: ▶If you would have them, I ask that you grant them sanctuary.

string.ID: If you would have them, I ask that you grant them sanctuary.

strings.string: ▶If you would have them, I ask that you grant them sanctuary.

string.ID: Boon-friend asks a friend-boon, and what boon is friend! rrk welcome slynth to an Yd, be safe and free as woodsmoke.

strings.string: ▶Boon-friend asks a friend-boon, and what boon is friend! rrk welcome slynth to an Yd, be safe and free as woodsmoke.

string.ID: You have my thanks, Goek.

strings.string: ▶You have my thanks, Goek.

string.ID: Ah! rrk would grant you this boon, rrk would. Were not for the unspoken cries of future-kin, free as woodsmoke but no more safe so longer. rrk would and cannot.

strings.string: ▶Ah! rrk would grant you this boon, rrk would. Were not for the unspoken cries of future-kin, free as woodsmoke but no more safe so longer. rrk would and cannot.

string.ID: rrk wonder of the glow-hats. Which wind will blow.

strings.string: ▶rrk wonder of the glow-hats. Which wind will blow.

string.ID: Greetings, =player.formalAddressTerm=! How arresting of the glow-hats arrival, much to do. rrk soothe Mak, Bep, Krka, look stores, still much slime and sweat to pool below rrk. Enjoy helpful toil!

strings.string: ▶Greetings, =player.formalAddressTerm=! How arresting of the glow-hats arrival, much to do. rrk soothe Mak, Bep, Krka, look stores, still much slime and sweat to pool below rrk. Enjoy helpful toil!

string.ID: My thanks, Goek.

strings.string: ▶My thanks, Goek.

string.ID:
All is well, =name=! Trials make for overcoming, and done together.
rrk can tell the sky dark and not know. Visit and witness! Glow-hats enliven the night, safe and free. Slynth-home is Yd.

strings.string:
▶All is well, =name=! Trials make for overcoming, and done together.
rrk can tell the sky dark and not know. Visit and witness! Glow-hats enliven the night, safe and free. Slynth-home is Yd.

string.ID: My thanks again, Goek.

strings.string: ▶My thanks again, Goek.

string.ID:
{{emote|*reeeeeps joyfully*}}
Greetings, =name=! Live and drink, friend.

strings.string:
▶{{emote|*reeeeeps joyfully*}}
Greetings, =name=! Live and drink, friend.

string.ID: rrk is called by dwellers Goek. rrk is a dweller here, too, and before then, a builder of place. Goek, Geeub, Mak and Many Eyes build a new Yd in the reef, hundreds of years.

strings.string: ▶rrk is called by dwellers Goek. rrk is a dweller here, too, and before then, a builder of place. Goek, Geeub, Mak and Many Eyes build a new Yd in the reef, hundreds of years.

string.ID: rrk did before then, but rrk all build it now.

strings.string: ▶rrk did before then, but rrk all build it now.

string.ID: rrk is svardym like the hatchling from the egg, but wound down the chute of years in hundreds, and grown so long and warty! rrk was a hatchling once, cries to think on it!

strings.string: ▶rrk is svardym like the hatchling from the egg, but wound down the chute of years in hundreds, and grown so long and warty! rrk was a hatchling once, cries to think on it!

string.ID: Aren't the svardym one of the Gyre plagues?

strings.string: ▶Aren't the svardym one of the Gyre plagues?

string.ID: Yes rrk was once, "plague" in the sky hundreds of years. Not so now. Longtime rrk, Geeub, Mak hide in the sponge and eat lice. When find Many Eyes, rrk and friends built the Yd. Joyful helping!

strings.string: ▶Yes rrk was once, "plague" in the sky hundreds of years. Not so now. Longtime rrk, Geeub, Mak hide in the sponge and eat lice. When find Many Eyes, rrk and friends built the Yd. Joyful helping!

string.ID: Do you know anything of the other plagues?

strings.string: ▶Do you know anything of the other plagues?

string.ID: Plagues bloom a thousand year then die back, shrink under the earth-sponge or move here and east. Vanta, girshling, rot die. rrk the hatchling once saw the Nephilim loom! rrk frightened and hid inside a sponge for thirty moons.

strings.string: ▶Plagues bloom a thousand year then die back, shrink under the earth-sponge or move here and east. Vanta, girshling, rot die. rrk the hatchling once saw the Nephilim loom! rrk frightened and hid inside a sponge for thirty moons.

string.ID: Do you know anything of the other plagues?

strings.string: ▶Do you know anything of the other plagues?

string.ID: Water and gas piped through the Yd to feed the plants, dwellers, and machines! Dwellers blew the glass in hues like the prism perch, to look pretty. Shared together. Joyful helping!

strings.string: ▶Water and gas piped through the Yd to feed the plants, dwellers, and machines! Dwellers blew the glass in hues like the prism perch, to look pretty. Shared together. Joyful helping!

string.ID:
rrk read the signs and descend the stairs. rrk breathe the water smoke and sit on starfish.
Visit hovels, meet friends Mak, Geeub, Bep, Krka, Une, Tilli, farmer Rokhas, and every rest!
rrk rrkself.

strings.string:
▶rrk read the signs and descend the stairs. rrk breathe the water smoke and sit on starfish.
Visit hovels, meet friends Mak, Geeub, Bep, Krka, Une, Tilli, farmer Rokhas, and every rest!
rrk rrkself.

string.ID: What indignity have you come to heap upon the mound, whelp? Out with it.

strings.string: ▶What indignity have you come to heap upon the mound, whelp? Out with it.

string.ID: You're one of the founders of this freehold, aren't you?

strings.string: ▶You're one of the founders of this freehold, aren't you?

string.ID: Who are you?

strings.string: ▶Who are you?

string.ID: I've never seen a frog of your stature.

strings.string: ▶I've never seen a frog of your stature.

string.ID: What can you tell me about the Freehold?

strings.string: ▶What can you tell me about the Freehold?

string.ID: This pond is peaceful.

strings.string: ▶This pond is peaceful.
▶{{emote|*crrrk*}}

string.ID: What of it? Scurry on and leave me to brood.

strings.string: ▶What of it? Scurry on and leave me to brood.

string.ID: This seems a joyful place. Why are you angry?

strings.string: ▶This seems a joyful place. Why are you angry?

string.ID: I've something else to ask

strings.string: ▶I've something else to ask

string.ID:
Why? A lifetime of vexation. Born to a cacophony of static ringing the ears raw. Thousands of my kinfolk cut down by that porphyric wasp fools called Lamb. A millenium of hot stinking sun and disgusting brine lice for supper.
Misery obtains on this pond, whelp. By Chavvah if you start beaming like a sunray and yodeling at the Beetle Moon, I'll eat you where you stand.

strings.string:
▶Why? A lifetime of vexation. Born to a cacophony of static ringing the ears raw. Thousands of my kinfolk cut down by that porphyric wasp fools called Lamb. A millenium of hot stinking sun and disgusting brine lice for supper.
Misery obtains on this pond, whelp. By Chavvah if you start beaming like a sunray and yodeling at the Beetle Moon, I'll eat you where you stand.

string.ID: ...I've more to ask.

strings.string: ▶...I've more to ask.

string.ID: Who am I? Mak. That's all you get. I'll not waste the honey of my mouth on idle inquiries.

strings.string: ▶Who am I? Mak. That's all you get. I'll not waste the honey of my mouth on idle inquiries.

string.ID:
...
And? Is that the whole of your fool statement?

strings.string:
▶...
And? Is that the whole of your fool statement?
▶Sì.

string.ID: I'll ask something else.

strings.string: ▶I'll ask something else.

string.ID: Trust what you hear of the svardym, whelp. The sky blackens at our accession and we are like to eat you.

strings.string: ▶Trust what you hear of the svardym, whelp. The sky blackens at our accession and we are like to eat you.

string.ID: Have the adiyy chewed the hue from your eyes? See for yourself. Free folk make a gathering here and their racket rings through the reef. One can hardly steep in his greens without being mewled to by a salt-stung baby.

strings.string: ▶Have the adiyy chewed the hue from your eyes? See for yourself. Free folk make a gathering here and their racket rings through the reef. One can hardly steep in his greens without being mewled to by a salt-stung baby.

string.ID: It was once.

strings.string: ▶It was once.

string.ID: What happened?

strings.string: ▶What happened?

string.ID: Whelp, affix your eyes to that clam right yonder. Go step inside and find your answers.

strings.string: ▶Whelp, affix your eyes to that clam right yonder. Go step inside and find your answers.

string.ID:
{{emote|*long, smoky croak*}}
Ah, =player.formalAddressTerm=, here at last. Sit. Smoke. Rest.

strings.string:
▶{{emote|*long, smoky croak*}}
Ah, =player.formalAddressTerm=, here at last. Sit. Smoke. Rest.

string.ID: Sorry, have we already spoken?

strings.string: ▶Sorry, have we already spoken?

string.ID: You're one of the founders of this freehold, aren't you?

strings.string: ▶You're one of the founders of this freehold, aren't you?

string.ID: Who are you?

strings.string: ▶Who are you?

string.ID: I can't help but notice your impressive stature, even in repose.

strings.string: ▶I can't help but notice your impressive stature, even in repose.

string.ID: What can you tell me about Yd?

strings.string: ▶What can you tell me about Yd?

string.ID:
Ayup. But seconds ago. As only yesterday, no? Hoh hoh hoh.
{{emote|*continued croaking laughter*}}

strings.string:
▶Ayup. But seconds ago. As only yesterday, no? Hoh hoh hoh.
{{emote|*continued croaking laughter*}}
▶*laugh*

string.ID: Ah. Well. Let's talk about something else, then.

strings.string: ▶Ah. Well. Let's talk about something else, then.

string.ID: Oh, very funny. Live and drink.

strings.string: ▶Oh, very funny. Live and drink.

string.ID: Greetings, Geeub. I am =name=.

strings.string: ▶Greetings, Geeub. I am =name=.

string.ID:
{{emote|*croaking sigh*}}
Congratulation, condolence, which ever. Mind and name slip by another.

strings.string:
▶{{emote|*croaking sigh*}}
Congratulation, condolence, which ever. Mind and name slip by another.

string.ID:
So large? Hoh hoh. Well. Hatchlings, so rage-dense. Size diffuses, no?
However. Mak diverges, hoh hoh. Egg-rage simmers on a greater pot. Our voice eld-feeble, close your ears to it. Hoh hoh hoh.

strings.string:
▶So large? Hoh hoh. Well. Hatchlings, so rage-dense. Size diffuses, no?
However. Mak diverges, hoh hoh. Egg-rage simmers on a greater pot. Our voice eld-feeble, close your ears to it. Hoh hoh hoh.

string.ID:
Sun we once blotted out nestles our horizon. We tend thought-seeds with algae, wrap in crysteel, bathe in arc-light. Build, live, fight.
Here as elsewhere, grow is struggle. Fun to watch, no? Hoh. Hoh.

strings.string:
▶Sun we once blotted out nestles our horizon. We tend thought-seeds with algae, wrap in crysteel, bathe in arc-light. Build, live, fight.
Here as elsewhere, grow is struggle. Fun to watch, no? Hoh. Hoh.

string.ID: Yes, we were present, if less active than other-bodies. But we saw, and rattle with memory-artifacts as a Consortium lockbox rattles with jewels; shards of an eon-old data disk, bits of stories and places. Kin-fleeing, louse-meals, ghastly boredom. But Fate's caprice brought us through history's footsteps. There was a machine-speaker, and her ursine apprentice with his little plant, and the Sower with a tetrad of chubby whelps, and then, at last, Many-Eyes. Our dear galgal. So many.

strings.string: ▶Yes, we were present, if less active than other-bodies. But we saw, and rattle with memory-artifacts as a Consortium lockbox rattles with jewels; shards of an eon-old data disk, bits of stories and places. Kin-fleeing, louse-meals, ghastly boredom. But Fate's caprice brought us through history's footsteps. There was a machine-speaker, and her ursine apprentice with his little plant, and the Sower with a tetrad of chubby whelps, and then, at last, Many-Eyes. Our dear galgal. So many.

string.ID: But alas. Like our sea-grape friend's lockbox, these memories are not mine to retrieve at will. They come and go, and may be warped by eld.

strings.string: ▶But alas. Like our sea-grape friend's lockbox, these memories are not mine to retrieve at will. They come and go, and may be warped by eld.

string.ID:
Oh, I am hardly an unbiased observer, I'm afraid -- the Freehold is the only welcoming home I could ever have imagined for myself, and my home before was worse than most. I feel a freedom and responsibility here that I would know nowhere else. That no one else could ever know at all.
But bias aside, you can see for yourself that we are a collective thriving without hierarchy. I'm rightly proud to defend that.

strings.string:
▶Oh, I am hardly an unbiased observer, I'm afraid -- the Freehold is the only welcoming home I could ever have imagined for myself, and my home before was worse than most. I feel a freedom and responsibility here that I would know nowhere else. That no one else could ever know at all.
But bias aside, you can see for yourself that we are a collective thriving without hierarchy. I'm rightly proud to defend that.

string.ID:
An old, old, old, old music machine.
Well, I suppose this one is not so old. This one I commissioned from a wandering artisan whose life I saved. A story for another time. Surely you've business.

strings.string:
▶An old, old, old, old music machine.
Well, I suppose this one is not so old. This one I commissioned from a wandering artisan whose life I saved. A story for another time. Surely you've business.

string.ID: Oh, so it called to you, a fellow dying animal?

strings.string: ▶Oh, so it called to you, a fellow dying animal?

string.ID: I'm not a dying animal.

strings.string: ▶I'm not a dying animal.

string.ID:
You are a dying animal. So am I. We are all dying animals, scrabbling for what extra scraps of time we can grasp. Even the eons-old. We are each and every one of us a dying animal. Or plant. We all decay, is the point.
And the hurdy-gurdy doesn't like how you sound either, for what it is worth.

strings.string:
▶You are a dying animal. So am I. We are all dying animals, scrabbling for what extra scraps of time we can grasp. Even the eons-old. We are each and every one of us a dying animal. Or plant. We all decay, is the point.
And the hurdy-gurdy doesn't like how you sound either, for what it is worth.

string.ID: Is this how you always greet visitors?

strings.string: ▶Is this how you always greet visitors?

string.ID:
Is this how you always visit settlements?
No. Do not answer. Is there aught you need?

strings.string:
▶Is this how you always visit settlements?
No. Do not answer. Is there aught you need?

string.ID: Of course my eyes do not glow. You see the glint of my mask's optics.

strings.string: ▶Of course my eyes do not glow. You see the glint of my mask's optics.

string.ID: Your shield bears resemblance to a Templar's Aegis.

strings.string: ▶Your shield bears resemblance to a Templar's Aegis.

string.ID:
If it were a Templar's Aegis, it would bear the holy rhombus.
No knight would be caught dead carrying this blank slate.

strings.string:
▶If it were a Templar's Aegis, it would bear the holy rhombus.
No knight would be caught dead carrying this blank slate.

string.ID: Where did you get it?

strings.string: ▶Where did you get it?

string.ID:
{{emote|*one long, luminous stare*}}
I think it best if we kept to more practical questions.

strings.string:
▶{{emote|*one long, luminous stare*}}
I think it best if we kept to more practical questions.

string.ID: I apologize for prying.

strings.string: ▶I apologize for prying.

string.ID: I insist you tell me.

strings.string: ▶I insist you tell me.

string.ID:
I am not wroth with you, but I owe you no conclusions so easily grasped.
All the same, consider yourself forgiven if you wish. Sit and listen to my hurdy-gurdy and we shall be friends.

strings.string:
▶I am not wroth with you, but I owe you no conclusions so easily grasped.
All the same, consider yourself forgiven if you wish. Sit and listen to my hurdy-gurdy and we shall be friends.

string.ID: Very well.

strings.string: ▶Very well.

string.ID:
I ken not why you thirst for truths not yours to consume. If I refuse, will you wrench them from my mouth as I wrench teeth from yours? What does that gain you?
Sit down, fool. Listen to music and calm yourself.

strings.string:
▶I ken not why you thirst for truths not yours to consume. If I refuse, will you wrench them from my mouth as I wrench teeth from yours? What does that gain you?
Sit down, fool. Listen to music and calm yourself.

string.ID: Then you are welcome. Make comfort as you need and I will play.

strings.string: ▶Then you are welcome. Make comfort as you need and I will play.

string.ID:
{{emote|*aloud, in a high-pitched buzzing voice*}}
A customer? A customer! Enter, =player.formalAddressTerm=, browse, buy. The Consortium's finest, stocked and sold by Tillifergaewicz! Tilli will do, but what will Tilli do... for you?

strings.string:
▶{{emote|*aloud, in a high-pitched buzzing voice*}}
A customer? A customer! Enter, =player.formalAddressTerm=, browse, buy. The Consortium's finest, stocked and sold by Tillifergaewicz! Tilli will do, but what will Tilli do... for you?

string.ID: You speak aloud. You're not telepathic?

strings.string: ▶You speak aloud. You're not telepathic?

string.ID: Greetings, Tilli. I am =name=.

strings.string: ▶Greetings, Tilli. I am =name=.

string.ID: What can you tell me about the Freehold?

strings.string: ▶What can you tell me about the Freehold?

string.ID: I'm fine, thank you. Live and drink.

strings.string: ▶I'm fine, thank you. Live and drink.

string.ID:
Ugh, ever telepathy. No requirement exists that Consortium merchants be mind-speakers, as swollen with their numbers as we are. I cannot blame you for your surprise, mind, I am simply frustrated.
Over years, I shaped something akin to a voice-box, which you hear now. I "made do", as Rokhas might say. Now what may I "make do" for you?

strings.string:
▶Ugh, ever telepathy. No requirement exists that Consortium merchants be mind-speakers, as swollen with their numbers as we are. I cannot blame you for your surprise, mind, I am simply frustrated.
Over years, I shaped something akin to a voice-box, which you hear now. I "made do", as Rokhas might say. Now what may I "make do" for you?

string.ID: Greetings, =name=, and welcome! In what wares may I interest you this day?

strings.string: ▶Greetings, =name=, and welcome! In what wares may I interest you this day?

string.ID:
Oh, I am joyous to reside here.
Yd could do, mind, with some measure of hierarchy, and more infrastructure, to attract wayfarers less adventuresome than yourself. Also, Mak absolutely must cease advising that anyone enter the clam; it is not funny and someone could die.
But... the structure of friendships here is true, and sturdy! Kindly keep this exchange between us. I was mostly kidding. Somewhat kidding.

strings.string:
▶Oh, I am joyous to reside here.
Yd could do, mind, with some measure of hierarchy, and more infrastructure, to attract wayfarers less adventuresome than yourself. Also, Mak absolutely must cease advising that anyone enter the clam; it is not funny and someone could die.
But... the structure of friendships here is true, and sturdy! Kindly keep this exchange between us. I was mostly kidding. Somewhat kidding.
▶Ayuh.

string.ID: Greetings. I am =name=.

strings.string: ▶Greetings. I am =name=.
▶Ayuh.
▶{{emote|*nods*}}
▶=name=.
▶*nod*

string.ID: Rokhas. I ranch these here beauts.

strings.string: ▶Rokhas. I ranch these here beauts.

string.ID: This is your ranch?

strings.string: ▶This is your ranch?

string.ID: Are those... giant slugs?

strings.string: ▶Are those... giant slugs?

string.ID: What do you think of the Yd Freehold?

strings.string: ▶What do you think of the Yd Freehold?

string.ID: Live and drink, Rokhas.

strings.string: ▶Live and drink, Rokhas.

string.ID:
I said I ranch these here beauts.
The Freeholders en't much for letting a body lay claim to land. En't what I'da wished for, but as the Issachari say: "Should your compass lead you to the Six Day Stilt, throw it in the well."

strings.string:
▶I said I ranch these here beauts.
The Freeholders en't much for letting a body lay claim to land. En't what I'da wished for, but as the Issachari say: "Should your compass lead you to the Six Day Stilt, throw it in the well."

string.ID: Are you from the desert? How did you end up here?

strings.string: ▶Are you from the desert? How did you end up here?

string.ID:
Lived most of m'life on a desert steppe twixt the flower fields of Qud and the M'ryee's salt pans.
I ended up here when m'snapbrain cousin played tinker with one of them coiler doodads. The less said about all that, the better.

strings.string:
▶Lived most of m'life on a desert steppe twixt the flower fields of Qud and the M'ryee's salt pans.
I ended up here when m'snapbrain cousin played tinker with one of them coiler doodads. The less said about all that, the better.

string.ID: Kaleidoslugs! Beautiful slugs, they are, lovely crooners. Love em. Big ole slugs. Heh.

strings.string: ▶Kaleidoslugs! Beautiful slugs, they are, lovely crooners. Love em. Big ole slugs. Heh.

string.ID:
Is what it is. Fine enough place. I've a trade, critters, and nowheres else to go.
I en't much for grand experiments, I just got to live. Ken?

strings.string:
▶Is what it is. Fine enough place. I've a trade, critters, and nowheres else to go.
I en't much for grand experiments, I just got to live. Ken?

string.ID: NON MOLOCH? NON MOLOCH RETURNEN FROM BRIGHTSHEOL.

strings.string: ▶NON MOLOCH? NON MOLOCH RETURNEN FROM BRIGHTSHEOL.

string.ID: Non Moloch?

strings.string: ▶Non Moloch?

string.ID: Yes, I've returned from Brightsheol.

strings.string: ▶Yes, I've returned from Brightsheol.
▶*LETTURA*

string.ID: NON MOLOCH HER AT HOM. NON MOLOCH IN MAQQOM YD.

strings.string: ▶NON MOLOCH HER AT HOM. NON MOLOCH IN MAQQOM YD.

string.ID: Maqqom Yd? The Place outside Itself?

strings.string: ▶Maqqom Yd? The Place outside Itself?
▶*LETTURA*

string.ID: MAQQOM YD. SOUTH-CONTRE FREEN FROM SALUM.

strings.string: ▶MAQQOM YD. SOUTH-CONTRE FREEN FROM SALUM.

string.ID: Many Eyes, can you tell me of Maqqom Yd?

strings.string: ▶Many Eyes, can you tell me of Maqqom Yd?

string.ID:
SOUTH-CONTRE FREEN FROM SALUM. BY TRETE WITH SAAD CALLEN MOLOCH, AND MONEIEN BI ALDERSESSE.
BY TRETE GALGALLIM BILDEN PIPE TO DRINKEN THANE SLIPSTREAM, AND FORGE TO BURNEN STEL-CRISTAL, AND CASKE TO HOLDEN GLOUINGE O FISH.

strings.string:
▶SOUTH-CONTRE FREEN FROM SALUM. BY TRETE WITH SAAD CALLEN MOLOCH, AND MONEIEN BI ALDERSESSE.
BY TRETE GALGALLIM BILDEN PIPE TO DRINKEN THANE SLIPSTREAM, AND FORGE TO BURNEN STEL-CRISTAL, AND CASKE TO HOLDEN GLOUINGE O FISH.

string.ID: And what of the Freehold? What do you do now?

strings.string: ▶And what of the Freehold? What do you do now?

string.ID: Who is Non Moloch, from before?

strings.string: ▶Who is Non Moloch, from before?

string.ID: BY TRETE GALGALLIM SERVEN, BUT NON NOU.

strings.string: ▶BY TRETE GALGALLIM SERVEN, BUT NON NOU.

string.ID: I want to ask something else.

strings.string: ▶I want to ask something else.

string.ID: YOU. YOU REGNEN NON HER. NON MOLOCH IN MAQQOM YD.

strings.string: ▶YOU. YOU REGNEN NON HER. NON MOLOCH IN MAQQOM YD.

string.ID: Ah, a stranger. Welcome to the hydropon. I am Thah.

strings.string: ▶Ah, a stranger. Welcome to the hydropon. I am Thah.

string.ID: Moon and Sun, Thah. I am =name=.

strings.string: ▶Moon and Sun, Thah. I am =name=.

string.ID: What manner of being are you?

strings.string: ▶What manner of being are you?

string.ID: Is all well here?

strings.string: ▶Is all well here?

string.ID: Live and drink, Thah.

strings.string: ▶Live and drink, Thah.

string.ID: Well met, =name=. Please forgive the, ah, austerity of our cradle. You may sup with us at our meager camp and rest under the shade of this Palladium shell. Sorry, as well, about the crowding.

strings.string: ▶Well met, =name=. Please forgive the, ah, austerity of our cradle. You may sup with us at our meager camp and rest under the shade of this Palladium shell. Sorry, as well, about the crowding.

string.ID: You don't seem to like your accommodations.

strings.string: ▶You don't seem to like your accommodations.

string.ID: We are called slynth, a people grown one by one from a hydroponic cradle containing a cutting of water lily and empowered by sunslag. We are but a handful of generations old, and kept no written history until I was grown, ah, some number of decades ago.

strings.string: ▶We are called slynth, a people grown one by one from a hydroponic cradle containing a cutting of water lily and empowered by sunslag. We are but a handful of generations old, and kept no written history until I was grown, ah, some number of decades ago.

string.ID:
Well enough. We drink the sun's rays, eat what we scavenge, rest under the shell, and it is. Enough.
I read and tinker. Some hunt. Others tend the cradle. Each day is like the next. Every so often, someone leaves.
We, ah, rarely hear from them thereafter. I hope they are all well.

strings.string:
▶Well enough. We drink the sun's rays, eat what we scavenge, rest under the shell, and it is. Enough.
I read and tinker. Some hunt. Others tend the cradle. Each day is like the next. Every so often, someone leaves.
We, ah, rarely hear from them thereafter. I hope they are all well.

string.ID: You don't seem happy with the status quo.

strings.string: ▶You don't seem happy with the status quo.

string.ID:
To be wholly honest, =name=, I grow frustrated.
We are a young species, grown one by one in yonder sun-touched cradle. Over years, we have increased, but not, ah, not. Not grown.
Look around you. You see it, yes? This hydropon is no settlement.

strings.string:
▶To be wholly honest, =name=, I grow frustrated.
We are a young species, grown one by one in yonder sun-touched cradle. Over years, we have increased, but not, ah, not. Not grown.
Look around you. You see it, yes? This hydropon is no settlement.

string.ID: How can I help?

strings.string: ▶How can I help?

string.ID:
This is an existential conundrum, =name=, I'm not sure that it could-- ah, wait, no. I am reconsidering.
No, you could help. If you wished. I think.
May I explain?

strings.string:
▶This is an existential conundrum, =name=, I'm not sure that it could-- ah, wait, no. I am reconsidering.
No, you could help. If you wished. I think.
May I explain?

string.ID: Please do.

strings.string: ▶Please do.

string.ID: I have changed my mind. Live and drink.

strings.string: ▶I have changed my mind. Live and drink.

string.ID: I don't believe my people wish to stay here, but we have had so little, ah, meaningful contact with other sapient creatures. We have no allies. We have nowhere to go but here.

strings.string: ▶I don't believe my people wish to stay here, but we have had so little, ah, meaningful contact with other sapient creatures. We have no allies. We have nowhere to go but here.

string.ID: You travel far and wide, do you not? You have the air of a traveling hero! From the epics. As such, you have seen many settlements, likely ingratiated yourself to some.

strings.string: ▶You travel far and wide, do you not? You have the air of a traveling hero! From the epics. As such, you have seen many settlements, likely ingratiated yourself to some.

string.ID: Surely, if you were to intercede on our behalf, some might welcome us? If, ah, let us say three settlements were to offer us shelter, this would grant us both direction and agency. Would you consider being our ambassador? Not unpaid.

strings.string: ▶Surely, if you were to intercede on our behalf, some might welcome us? If, ah, let us say three settlements were to offer us shelter, this would grant us both direction and agency. Would you consider being our ambassador? Not unpaid.

string.ID: I will help.

strings.string: ▶I will help.

string.ID: I decline. Live and drink.

strings.string: ▶I decline. Live and drink.

string.ID:
Thank you, =name=. I have, ah, I have been crafting a personal project. Of sorts. I promise it to you for this task, and of course the gratitude of a young species.
Return to me after settlements agree to grant us refuge, and I will discuss them with my kin.

strings.string:
▶Thank you, =name=. I have, ah, I have been crafting a personal project. Of sorts. I promise it to you for this task, and of course the gratitude of a young species.
Return to me after settlements agree to grant us refuge, and I will discuss them with my kin.

string.ID: Live and drink. I will return with news.

strings.string: ▶Vivi e bevi. I will return with news.

string.ID: Come, =name=. It is time.

strings.string: ▶Come, =name=. It is time.

string.ID:
Ah, =name=, Moon and Sun.
Any news of our future home?

strings.string:
▶Ah, =name=, Moon and Sun.
Any news of our future home?

string.ID: Yes, I have news about the slynths' sanctuary.

strings.string: ▶Yes, I have news about the slynths' sanctuary.

string.ID: None yet. Live and drink, Thah.

strings.string: ▶None yet. Live and drink, Thah.

string.ID: Ah! Let us discuss?

strings.string: ▶Ah! Let us discuss?

string.ID:
Joppa! An historic site. I wasn't sure if, ah, it still existed. As a village.
The quiet of the saltmarshes may be strange to my people, but some have voiced a wish for more peace than the Reef can spare. Thank you for this choice, =name=.

strings.string:
▶Joppa! An historic site. I wasn't sure if, ah, it still existed. As a village.
The quiet of the saltmarshes may be strange to my people, but some have voiced a wish for more peace than the Reef can spare. Thank you for this choice, =name=.

string.ID:
The worshippers of Shekhinah? Fascinating. I, ah, don't know what to think of that.
It may be what my kin need, now I consider it. The Canticles make little sense to me but they are, ah, compelling. More compelling than me, certainly. I will discuss this with the others.

strings.string:
▶The worshippers of Shekhinah? Fascinating. I, ah, don't know what to think of that.
It may be what my kin need, now I consider it. The Canticles make little sense to me but they are, ah, compelling. More compelling than me, certainly. I will discuss this with the others.

string.ID:
Did you say Barathrumites? So that's how it's pronounced.
Grit Gate is, ah... that's where Q Girl resides, isn't it? She wrote my favorite book, {{W|Disquisition on the Malady of the Mimic}}. I imagine such a home would have a positive effect on my kin. I will speak to them.

strings.string:
▶Did you say Barathrumites? So that's how it's pronounced.
Grit Gate is, ah... that's where Q Girl resides, isn't it? She wrote my favorite book, {{W|Disquisition on the Malady of the Mimic}}. I imagine such a home would have a positive effect on my kin. I will speak to them.

string.ID:
Kyakukya? I didn't realize it had so many syllables.
That's where the, ah, faithful to the ape-god gather, correct? And, uh... Crowsong, as well. I will present this possibility to my people and we will discuss it.

strings.string:
▶Kyakukya? I didn't realize it had so many syllables.
That's where the, ah, faithful to the ape-god gather, correct? And, uh... Crowsong, as well. I will present this possibility to my people and we will discuss it.

string.ID:
Ezra is, ah, the village at the base of the Spindle, is it not?
The very cradle of history. Not that my kin have a strong taste for history, but perhaps living amongst fresco and bas-relief will change their, ah, collective outlook?

strings.string:
▶Ezra is, ah, the village at the base of the Spindle, is it not?
The very cradle of history. Not that my kin have a strong taste for history, but perhaps living amongst fresco and bas-relief will change their, ah, collective outlook?

string.ID: Fascinating. I know nothing about these mopango, but any people whose love for learning and discovery defines them are, ah... good, in my opinion. I will discuss this with my kin, and see if they agree.

strings.string: ▶Fascinating. I know nothing about these mopango, but any people whose love for learning and discovery defines them are, ah... good, in my opinion. I will discuss this with my kin, and see if they agree.

string.ID:
There is a sadness in, ah... choosing pariahs. Some of my kin dreamed of belonging, and the very word is the antithesis of belonging.
But then, if wanderers look after one another, there is a belonging in that as well. Even alone, we would not be alone. I will offer this choice to the others and we will discuss it.

strings.string:
▶There is a sadness in, ah... choosing pariahs. Some of my kin dreamed of belonging, and the very word is the antithesis of belonging.
But then, if wanderers look after one another, there is a belonging in that as well. Even alone, we would not be alone. I will offer this choice to the others and we will discuss it.

string.ID:
The nearby settlement? The one, ah, founded by three svardym and a galgal? I've always been mortally afraid to go there, knowing even the barest facts.
But you say they will accept us? Perhaps I was wrong.

strings.string:
▶The nearby settlement? The one, ah, founded by three svardym and a galgal? I've always been mortally afraid to go there, knowing even the barest facts.
But you say they will accept us? Perhaps I was wrong.

string.ID:
Bey Lah is real? Stain me surprised to hear so... I, ah, believed the hindren exclusively diasporic.
There is an undeniable poetry in it, if the slynth should emigrate to a mythical and secretive village. I will discuss this with my kin.

strings.string:
▶Bey Lah is real? Stain me surprised to hear so... I, ah, believed the hindren exclusively diasporic.
There is an undeniable poetry in it, if the slynth should emigrate to a mythical and secretive village. I will discuss this with my kin.

string.ID:
Chavvah? The, ah, the... the tree of life? Allows us joining?
That, that is simply, ah, extraordinary. I will apprise my kin of this, and we will, ah... we will ponder what it may mean for us.

strings.string:
▶Chavvah? The, ah, the... the tree of life? Allows us joining?
That, that is simply, ah, extraordinary. I will apprise my kin of this, and we will, ah... we will ponder what it may mean for us.

string.ID: I have made my inquiries. It is time for the slynth to choose a new home.

strings.string: ▶I have made my inquiries. It is time for the slynth to choose a new home.

string.ID: The village of Joppa has agreed to accept the slynth as their own.

strings.string: ▶The village of Joppa has agreed to accept the slynth as their own.

string.ID: The Mechanimists of the Six Day Stilt agreed to accept the slynth as their own.

strings.string: ▶The Mechanimists of the Six Day Stilt agreed to accept the slynth as their own.

string.ID: The Barathrumites of Grit Gate agreed to accept the slynth as their own.

strings.string: ▶The Barathrumites of Grit Gate agreed to accept the slynth as their own.

string.ID: The village of Kyakukya has agreed to accept the slynth as their own.

strings.string: ▶The village of Kyakukya has agreed to accept the slynth as their own.

string.ID: The village of Ezra has agreed to accept the slynth as their own.

strings.string: ▶The village of Ezra has agreed to accept the slynth as their own.

string.ID: The mopango of the Tomb agreed to accept the slynth as their own.

strings.string: ▶The mopango of the Tomb agreed to accept the slynth as their own.

string.ID: If the slynth choose to wander Qud, the Pariahs have agreed to look after them.

strings.string: ▶If the slynth choose to wander Qud, the Pariahs have agreed to look after them.

string.ID: The Yd Freehold agreed to accept the slynth as their own.

strings.string: ▶The Yd Freehold agreed to accept the slynth as their own.

string.ID: The village of Bey Lah has agreed to accept the slynth as their own.

strings.string: ▶The village of Bey Lah has agreed to accept the slynth as their own.

string.ID: The chimes of Chavvah have agreed to accept the slynth as their own.

strings.string: ▶The chimes of Chavvah have agreed to accept the slynth as their own.

string.ID: Let's talk about something else.

strings.string: ▶Let's talk about something else.

string.ID:
I read a history once that mentioned =village.name=, taking note of their reverence for =village.sacred= and equal loathing of =village.profane=.
Will my kin accept a life of =village.activity=? I will consult with them.

strings.string:
▶I read a history once that mentioned =village.name=, taking note of their reverence for =village.sacred= and equal loathing of =village.profane=.
Will my kin accept a life of =village.activity=? I will consult with them.

string.ID: The village of =village.name= has agreed to accept the slynth as their own.

strings.string: ▶The village of =village.name= has agreed to accept the slynth as their own.

string.ID: Wanderer, thank you! I will tell my kin of these places. We will convene and discuss, and we will, ah, choose. Please be patient in the meantime.

strings.string: ▶Wanderer, thank you! I will tell my kin of these places. We will convene and discuss, and we will, ah, choose. Please be patient in the meantime.

string.ID: As you say, Thah. I will return.

strings.string: ▶As you say, Thah. I will return.

string.ID: Moon and Sun, =name=.

strings.string: ▶Moon and Sun, =name=.

string.ID: It's curious to see you still here, after helping your kin emigrate.

strings.string: ▶It's curious to see you still here, after helping your kin emigrate.

string.ID: Why have you asked me to return?

strings.string: ▶Why have you asked me to return?

string.ID: Moon and Sun, Thah.

strings.string: ▶Moon and Sun, Thah.

string.ID: I've been crafting a kind of a relic, a piece of art that serves a purpose and that you can carry on your, ah, your person. I finally finished building it while you were away, and the opportunities you offered us inspired the finishing touches. I'd like you to have it.

strings.string: ▶I've been crafting a kind of a relic, a piece of art that serves a purpose and that you can carry on your, ah, your person. I finally finished building it while you were away, and the opportunities you offered us inspired the finishing touches. I'd like you to have it.

string.ID: I will cherish it. Live and drink.

strings.string: ▶I will cherish it. Live and drink.

string.ID:
After some discussion and deliberation, we have come to consensus: Joppa shall be the new home of the slynth. The notion of a lasting, peaceful life with, ah, purpose... this appeals to many of our number, and where better than Abram's very watervine marsh?
Our emigration party departs for the saltmarshes in the morning.

strings.string:
▶After some discussion and deliberation, we have come to consensus: Joppa shall be the new home of the slynth. The notion of a lasting, peaceful life with, ah, purpose... this appeals to many of our number, and where better than Abram's very watervine marsh?
Our emigration party departs for the saltmarshes in the morning.

string.ID:
After some discussion and deliberation, we have come to consensus: most of our number will join the Mechanimist faith, and reside at the Stiltgrounds at the edge of the Mogh'ra'yi.
Our emigration party departs for the Six Day Stilt in the morning.

strings.string:
▶After some discussion and deliberation, we have come to consensus: most of our number will join the Mechanimist faith, and reside at the Stiltgrounds at the edge of the Mogh'ra'yi.
Our emigration party departs for the Six Day Stilt in the morning.

string.ID:
After some discussion and deliberation, we have come to consensus: The new home of the slynth is among the disciples of Barathrum. My kin have agreed to dedicate themselves to the pursuits of learning and service.
Our emigration party departs for Grit Gate in the morning.

strings.string:
▶After some discussion and deliberation, we have come to consensus: The new home of the slynth is among the disciples of Barathrum. My kin have agreed to dedicate themselves to the pursuits of learning and service.
Our emigration party departs for Grit Gate in the morning.

string.ID:
After some discussion and deliberation, we have come to consensus: Kyakukya shall be the new home of the slynth. There are many ways to grow when one is planted in the very heart of Qud.
Our emigration party departs for the river in the morning.

strings.string:
▶After some discussion and deliberation, we have come to consensus: Kyakukya shall be the new home of the slynth. There are many ways to grow when one is planted in the very heart of Qud.
Our emigration party departs for the river in the morning.

string.ID:
After some discussion and deliberation, we have come to consensus: The new home of the slynth is among the villagers of Ezra, harvesting musa alongside the banana ranchers and singing their songs.
Our emigration party departs for Omonporch in the morning.

strings.string:
▶After some discussion and deliberation, we have come to consensus: The new home of the slynth is among the villagers of Ezra, harvesting musa alongside the banana ranchers and singing their songs.
Our emigration party departs for Omonporch in the morning.

string.ID:
After some discussion and deliberation, we have come to consensus: the slynth shall become mopango, taking root in ancient rock and casting our gaze back toward the history that preceded us.
Our emigration party departs for the Tomb of the Eaters in the morning.

strings.string:
▶After some discussion and deliberation, we have come to consensus: the slynth shall become mopango, taking root in ancient rock and casting our gaze back toward the history that preceded us.
Our emigration party departs for the Tomb of the Eaters in the morning.

string.ID:
After some discussion and deliberation, we have come to consensus: The new home of the slynth is no home at all, but the floating fellowship of Qud's Pariahs. We were blessed with roots that need not fix themselves to the soil and have opted to use them accordingly.
We will split into parties and leave to meet with other wayfarers come morning.

strings.string:
▶After some discussion and deliberation, we have come to consensus: The new home of the slynth is no home at all, but the floating fellowship of Qud's Pariahs. We were blessed with roots that need not fix themselves to the soil and have opted to use them accordingly.
We will split into parties and leave to meet with other wayfarers come morning.

string.ID:
After some discussion and deliberation, we have come to consensus: the slynth shall join the Yd Freehold, remaining in the reef where our cradle lies but mingling among other sapient creatures to learn their ways and teach what we know.
Our emigration party departs for the Freehold in the morning.

strings.string:
▶After some discussion and deliberation, we have come to consensus: the slynth shall join the Yd Freehold, remaining in the reef where our cradle lies but mingling among other sapient creatures to learn their ways and teach what we know.
Our emigration party departs for the Freehold in the morning.

string.ID:
After some discussion and deliberation, we have come to consensus: Bey Lah shall be the new home of the slynth. There is a familiarity to this tucked-away village, newly greeting the world; this is our gentle emergence from obscurity, and one not undertaken alone.
Our emigration party departs for the flower fields in the morning.

strings.string:
▶After some discussion and deliberation, we have come to consensus: Bey Lah shall be the new home of the slynth. There is a familiarity to this tucked-away village, newly greeting the world; this is our gentle emergence from obscurity, and one not undertaken alone.
Our emigration party departs for the flower fields in the morning.

string.ID:
After some discussion and deliberation, we have come to consensus: the slynth shall become a part of Chavvah, the living city. There are no words for the breadth of futures before us, and we would not know them if they were. Perhaps we will learn to chime.
Our emigration party departs for the moon stair in the morning.

strings.string:
▶After some discussion and deliberation, we have come to consensus: the slynth shall become a part of Chavvah, the living city. There are no words for the breadth of futures before us, and we would not know them if they were. Perhaps we will learn to chime.
Our emigration party departs for the moon stair in the morning.

string.ID:
After some discussion and deliberation, we have come to consensus: the slynth shall become citizens of =village.name=. We shall learn the practice of =village.activity=, hold =village.sacred= dear and spurn =village.profane=.
Our emigration party departs for =village.name= in the morning.

strings.string:

string.ID: May the Argent Fathers watch over you.

strings.string: ▶May the Argent Fathers watch over you.

string.ID: May you find knowledge.

strings.string: ▶May you find knowledge.

string.ID: May Oboroqoru be merciful.

strings.string: ▶May Oboroqoru be merciful.

string.ID: May the Eaters protect you.

strings.string: ▶May the Eaters protect you.

string.ID: Mayest thou rest ever in the Light of the Kasaphescence.

strings.string: ▶Mayest thou rest ever in the Light of the Kasaphescence.

string.ID: May the winds favor you.

strings.string: ▶May the winds favor you.

string.ID: Chime joyfully.

strings.string: ▶Chime joyfully.

string.ID: May the Fates favor you.

strings.string: ▶May the Fates favor you.

string.ID:
Ah, one last little thing, =name=. About your reward... it's not quite finished, but now I know just what it needs.
Please return to the hydropon after my kin have safely reached their new home and I will give it to you. I will not leave the cradle.

strings.string:
▶Ah, one last little thing, =name=. About your reward... it's not quite finished, but now I know just what it needs.
Please return to the hydropon after my kin have safely reached their new home and I will give it to you. I will not leave the cradle.

string.ID: I will. Live and drink.

strings.string: ▶I will. Live and drink.

string.ID:
Yes, I've decided to stay. It's not that, ah, it's not that I wouldn't enjoy a life of farming. But the thought of leaving the cradle after decades of watching it... I couldn't.
The hydropon is even less a village now, but you're welcome to rest here whenever you like.

strings.string:
▶Yes, I've decided to stay. It's not that, ah, it's not that I wouldn't enjoy a life of farming. But the thought of leaving the cradle after decades of watching it... I couldn't.
The hydropon is even less a village now, but you're welcome to rest here whenever you like.

string.ID:
Yes, I've stayed. I don't, ah, resent that my kin have found succor in the embrace of faith, but I don't know how to walk that path myself. Someone needs to watch over the hydropon, besides.
The hydropon is even less a village now, but you're welcome to rest here whenever you like.

strings.string:
▶Yes, I've stayed. I don't, ah, resent that my kin have found succor in the embrace of faith, but I don't know how to walk that path myself. Someone needs to watch over the hydropon, besides.
The hydropon is even less a village now, but you're welcome to rest here whenever you like.

string.ID:
Yes, I've stayed. I'd love to see the vaunted halls and, ah, bathe in the light of brilliant minds, but when I think about the journey my roots lock up. I feel, ah, unready. Someone must watch over the cradle, besides.
The hydropon is even less a village now, but you're welcome to rest here whenever you like.

strings.string:
▶Yes, I've stayed. I'd love to see the vaunted halls and, ah, bathe in the light of brilliant minds, but when I think about the journey my roots lock up. I feel, ah, unready. Someone must watch over the cradle, besides.
The hydropon is even less a village now, but you're welcome to rest here whenever you like.

string.ID:
Yes, I've decided to stay. It's not that, ah, it's not that I wouldn't enjoy sharing knowledge with the mayor of our new home. But the thought of leaving the cradle after decades of watching it... I couldn't.
The hydropon is even less a village now, but you're welcome to rest here whenever you like.

strings.string:
▶Yes, I've decided to stay. It's not that, ah, it's not that I wouldn't enjoy sharing knowledge with the mayor of our new home. But the thought of leaving the cradle after decades of watching it... I couldn't.
The hydropon is even less a village now, but you're welcome to rest here whenever you like.

string.ID:
Yes, I've stayed. As fascinated as I would be to examine the statuary and bas-reliefs, my favorite mode of, ah, interaction with history is through the written word. Someone must watch over the cradle, besides.
The hydropon is even less a village now, but you're welcome to rest here whenever you like.

strings.string:
▶Yes, I've stayed. As fascinated as I would be to examine the statuary and bas-reliefs, my favorite mode of, ah, interaction with history is through the written word. Someone must watch over the cradle, besides.
The hydropon is even less a village now, but you're welcome to rest here whenever you like.

string.ID:
Yes, I've decided to stay. The Tomb sounds, ah, cozy, but I cannot fathom making such a macabre place my home. Someone must look over the cradle, besides.
The hydropon is even less a village now, but you're welcome to rest here whenever you like.

strings.string:
▶Yes, I've decided to stay. The Tomb sounds, ah, cozy, but I cannot fathom making such a macabre place my home. Someone must look over the cradle, besides.
The hydropon is even less a village now, but you're welcome to rest here whenever you like.

string.ID:
Yes, I've stayed. If I am entirely honest, the idea of a life on the road sounds, ah... unpleasant. To me, personally. I have grown accustomed to a life of collection, curation, and study that I don't care to abandon for adventure. Someone must stay to watch over the cradle, besides.
The hydropon is even less a village now, but you're welcome to rest here whenever you like.

strings.string:
▶Yes, I've stayed. If I am entirely honest, the idea of a life on the road sounds, ah... unpleasant. To me, personally. I have grown accustomed to a life of collection, curation, and study that I don't care to abandon for adventure. Someone must stay to watch over the cradle, besides.
The hydropon is even less a village now, but you're welcome to rest here whenever you like.

string.ID:
Yes, I've decided to stay. I don't disbelieve that the Yd Freehold is as safe as you say, but the fears instilled in me when I first learned to read as a fresh sprout haunt me even now. Perhaps in time I will visit, but in the meantime I can look after the cradle, as someone ought to do.
The hydropon is even less a village now, but you're welcome to rest here whenever you like.

strings.string:
▶Yes, I've decided to stay. I don't disbelieve that the Yd Freehold is as safe as you say, but the fears instilled in me when I first learned to read as a fresh sprout haunt me even now. Perhaps in time I will visit, but in the meantime I can look after the cradle, as someone ought to do.
The hydropon is even less a village now, but you're welcome to rest here whenever you like.

string.ID:
Yes, I've decided to stay. The flower fields sound beautiful, and no doubt there is much to learn from the hindren. But the thought of leaving the cradle after decades of watching it... I couldn't.
The hydropon is even less a village now, but you're welcome to rest here whenever you like.

strings.string:
▶Yes, I've decided to stay. The flower fields sound beautiful, and no doubt there is much to learn from the hindren. But the thought of leaving the cradle after decades of watching it... I couldn't.
The hydropon is even less a village now, but you're welcome to rest here whenever you like.

string.ID:
Yes, I, ah, I remain.
I badly wish to taste of Chavvah's secrets, but the wonder I feel for such an entity is eclipsed only by the terror of such an experience. I cling to an excuse that the hydropon must be watched and wait. Perhaps someday I will shed that excuse's film and step free.
The hydropon is even less a village now, but you're welcome to rest here whenever you like.

strings.string:
▶Yes, I, ah, I remain.
I badly wish to taste of Chavvah's secrets, but the wonder I feel for such an entity is eclipsed only by the terror of such an experience. I cling to an excuse that the hydropon must be watched and wait. Perhaps someday I will shed that excuse's film and step free.
The hydropon is even less a village now, but you're welcome to rest here whenever you like.

string.ID:
Yes, I've decided to stay. I'm sure =village.name= is a good home for my kin, but I have no particular loathing for =village.profane= and even less reverence for =village.sacred=. Someone must look over the cradle, besides.
The hydropon is even less a village now, but you're welcome to rest here whenever you like.

strings.string:

string.ID: Ah! You seem wanderer. How fare?

strings.string: ▶Live and grow, =player.formalAddressTerm=.
